all.en: Mark and I had been arguing about every detail of the report for two days.
all.zh: 馬克和我為了報告的每個細節爭論了兩天。

all.en: He insisted his approach was correct and dismissed my suggestions without listening.
all.zh: 他堅持自己的做法才對，連聽都不聽就否定我的建議。

all.en: I tried to stay calm, but his sarcastic comments started to wear me down.
all.zh: 我試著保持冷靜，但他諷刺的話語漸漸消磨我的耐心。

all.en: Other teammates avoided getting involved, leaving me to handle him alone.
all.zh: 其他同事都避免捲入，留下我獨自應付他。

all.en: I decided to invite him for coffee to clear the air privately.
all.zh: 我決定請他喝杯咖啡，私下把事情說清楚。

all.en: In the café, I explained that his tone made cooperation very difficult.
all.zh: 在咖啡廳，我向他說明他的語氣讓合作變得非常困難。

all.en: To my surprise, he admitted he had been stressed about a family issue.
all.zh: 出乎意料地，他坦承自己最近因家裡的事而壓力很大。

all.en: We agreed to give each other honest feedback without personal attacks.
all.zh: 我們同意以後給彼此誠實的回饋，不做人身攻擊。

all.en: Back at the office, we divided the report into sections that played to our strengths.
all.zh: 回到辦公室，我們把報告分成各自擅長的部分。

all.en: The atmosphere improved noticeably, and we finished the project on time.
all.zh: 氣氛明顯好轉，我們也準時完成了專案。

all.en: I realized that difficult people are sometimes just people having a difficult time.
all.zh: 我體會到，所謂難相處的人，有時只是正經歷難熬日子的人。
